title: Industrial Revolution EMI Plugin
description: An EMI addon that adds recipes for Industrial Revolution and adds missing items to the index.
body:
# Industrial Revolution EMI Plugin

![Pulverizer recipe example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1629c09f3ab1d2d5e5495c71e2e42979660fa090.png)

Adds recipes from [Industrial Revolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-revolution) to EMI recipe viewer including all allowed ores in the Mining Rig.

Additionally translates tags and fixes missing items from the index - ores, ingots, dusts, tools, armor etc. You will finally be able to see Nikolite.

Almost every feature of the mod is configurable to prevent issues with Extra Mod Integrations' IndRev integration. Visit [https://github.com/Timardo/Industrial-Revolution-EMI-Plugin](https://github.com/Timardo/Industrial-Revolution-EMI-Plugin) for more information about the config.

More example screenshots in Gallery
